title: The Evolution of Blockchain Technology
description: A chronological timeline showing the key milestones and foundational concepts that led to the development and maturation of blockchain technology.
elements: 1991: First Blockchain-like Protocol (Stuart Haber & W. Scott Stornetta)
2009: Genesis Block Mined (Launch of Bitcoin Network)
relationships: Shows the chronological progression and building upon previous ideas, from theoretical cryptographic concepts to the implementation of decentralized cryptocurrencies and smart contract platforms.
